text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hup! Hah! ♪ Nice, a new high score!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day while passing by the arcade, I spot Tokai
Teio playing a dance game while surrounded by a
large crowd.

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text:
You're amazing, Teio!
So cool! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After every song, the onlookers erupt into cheers
and applause. I can't imagine she's anything less
than delighted by the support. However...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, I know you. You watched me dance the
other day too, right?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then you remember how hard I worked to boost
that one game's popularity, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, lately, it feels like everyone's just focused
on watching me. Hardly any of them seem
interested in the game itself...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean, don't get me wrong. I love all the praise
I'm getting, but still...
choice_data_list: You want everyone to play the game too, right?
You want everyone to play the game too, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! What can I do to make that happen
though?
choice_data_list: Why not find someone else to play the game?
What if you dance with the audience?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What? Instead of me? Why?!
choice_data_list:
They might find the game more approachable if
someone else played it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio is so incredibly skilled at the game
that it might actually be turning people off the
idea of playing it themselves.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I hadn't thought about it from that
perspective. But that makes sense...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay, then! It's time to recruit a helper!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So did you pick me for this because I seem like I'd
be terrible at dance games?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What? I know you can dance, Nature. I picked
you because it looked like you had time on your
hands.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, there's no need to glare like that! Look, the
game's about to start!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wha?! H-hold on! I still don't know how to play!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You'll be fine! I'll help you out. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wh-what do I do?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Copy me! Just step to the rhythm.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's it! You're doing great! ♪ Now keep it up
and follow my lead!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, I got the third-highest score?! Sigh. Even outside of races, I end up in third...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's incredible for your first time playing!
You've still got nothing on me, though. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You could've kept that last part to yourself... But
yeah, that was kinda fun.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl A
text_block_list.text:
I thought just watching that game was fun, but maybe I
should try playing it too...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'd call that a smashing success.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What is?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You did great, Nature! On top of all the praise
I've heaped on you, I'm also going to treat you to
some honeyade. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...But why?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Dance together? Why?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Playing alone probably feels daunting, but I
figure people might be more willing to try if they
have someone dancing with them.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Now that you mention it, that game does have a two-player mode...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I guess I could help out. But I don't want to
dance with just anyone.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I mean, this is me we're talking about! I shouldn't be giving people the honor of dancing with me for nothing.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's right. If they want that honor, they'll have
to work for it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Listen up! If you want a chance to dance with me,
raise your hand!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text:
Me, please! I want to dance with you!
Ooh! Me, me, me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heh, now we're talking. ♪ I can't possibly dance
with all of you...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So how about this? Let's have a little tournament,
and the last player standing gets to dance with
me!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl A
text_block_list.text:
I really want to dance with Teio, but I've only ever
watched her play this game...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, then I guess you're not interested in taking
my hand.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's not good enough. You need to put in the
effort. But I know you can try your best for me...
can't you?

text_block_list.name: High School Girl A
text_block_list.text: Ah! Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins a sudden competition where the
prize is the chance to dance with Tokai Teio. It
takes everyone a while to get used to the game,
but...

text_block_list.name: High School Girl A
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! My legs keep getting tangled up!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl B
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Same, but this is pretty fun, huh? It's hard,
but I really want to improve my score!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Good! They all look like they're having fun. What
a perfectly delightful development! ♪
